hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess, re, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if not re.search(r'\\bgit\\s+(tag|push)\\b', cmd):
    sys.exit(0)
print('Running cargo fmt + clippy before git tag/push...', flush=True)
result_fmt = subprocess.run(['cargo', 'fmt', '--all'], cwd=os.environ.get('PWD', '.'))
if result_fmt.returncode != 0:
    print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'cargo fmt failed'}))
    sys.exit(0)
result_clippy = subprocess.run(['cargo', 'clippy', '--all', '--', '-D', 'warnings'], cwd=os.environ.get('PWD', '.'))
if result_clippy.returncode != 0:
    print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'cargo clippy failed — fix warnings before tagging/pushing'}))
    sys.exit(0)
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'cargo fmt + clippy passed'}))
"
